commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=211cea91a498aa7311a3d80bf3e5cab0facab176)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Windows SIGUSR1 guard in gateway process signaling, routes Windows unmanaged gateway restart through the existing scheduled-task restart helper, and adds focused unit tests.

Reproducibility: no. live Windows repro was run, but source inspection gives a clear current-main failure path: unmanaged restart on win32 reaches process.kill(pid, "SIGUSR1"), while Node’s Windows signal contract does not support SIGUSR1 as an external signal.
commands.review_followup: Contributor revision and real Windows proof are needed; this is not a safe ClawSweeper repair candidate because automation cannot provide the contributor’s real environment proof.

target.title: fix: handle SIGUSR1 restart on Windows where the signal is unsupported
target.body:
## Summary

On Windows, `process.kill(pid, "SIGUSR1")` throws `TypeError [ERR_UNKNOWN_SIGNAL]: Unknown signal: SIGUSR1` because SIGUSR1 is a Unix-only signal. This broke `openclaw gateway restart` for unmanaged gateway processes on Windows.

## Changes

### 1. `src/infra/gateway-processes.ts` — Defensive guard
- `signalVerifiedGatewayPidSync` now throws a clear, actionable error when SIGUSR1 is used on win32 instead of crashing with an obscure Node.js `ERR_UNKNOWN_SIGNAL` error.

### 2. `src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.ts` — Platform-appropriate restart
- `restartGatewayWithoutServiceManager` now uses `triggerOpenClawRestart()` (Windows scheduled task mechanism) on win32 instead of sending SIGUSR1 directly. This is consistent with how `emitGatewayRestart` already handles the in-process Windows path.

## Test plan
- [x] Added unit test: `gateway-processes.test.ts` — "rejects SIGUSR1 on Windows"
- [x] Added unit test: `lifecycle.test.ts` — "uses Windows scheduled task for unmanaged gateway restart"
- [x] Existing test "signals a single unmanaged gateway process on restart" pinned to linux platform for deterministic behavior

## Related

Fixes the "Gateway restart failed: TypeError [ERR_UNKNOWN_SIGNAL]: Unknown signal: SIGUSR1" error on Windows.
target.author: thatgfsj
